errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms and Conditions and acknowledge the Privacy Notice.
errors.subInvalid: Invalid subdomain. Use 3–63 lowercase letters, numbers or hyphens (not at the beginning or end).
errors.subReserved: This subdomain is reserved. Please choose another.
errors.subTaken: This subdomain is already in use.
errors.defaultTierCantDelete: The default tier cannot be deleted.
errors.tierDeleteStripeBlocked: This tier can only be deleted after Stripe confirms that all linked subscriptions have ended. No data was deleted.
errors.memberRemoveStripeFailed: The Stripe subscription could not be ended safely. The member was not removed and no local access was deleted.
errors.tenantDeleteConfirmMismatch: The entered community slug does not match.
errors.tenantDeleteStripeSubscriptionsActive: The community can only be deleted after all Stripe subscriptions have ended. No data was deleted.
errors.tenantDeleteStripeCleanupFailed: Stripe or Connect cleanup failed. The community and its data were not deleted.
errors.paidTierArchivedInsteadOfDeleted: The paid tier was safely hidden instead of deleted so open Stripe payments can still be processed correctly.
errors.pendingPaymentsBlockDeletion: Deletion is blocked while pending payments or reservations exist. No data was deleted.
errors.productArchivedBecauseOrdersExist: The product was hidden instead of deleted because orders reference it. Pending payments can still be processed safely.

legalPurchase.immediateAccess: I request immediate access and understand that my right of withdrawal expires once digital delivery begins. <withdrawal>Details</withdrawal>.
legalPurchase.requiredError: Please confirm immediate access before continuing.

legalReview.title: Review the current terms
legalReview.description: Please review the current Terms and Conditions and Privacy Notice, then confirm before continuing.
legalReview.required: Please accept the Terms and Conditions and acknowledge the Privacy Notice.

auth.legalAcceptance: I accept the <terms>Terms and Conditions</terms> and acknowledge the <privacy>Privacy Notice</privacy>.

c7.title: Everything under your brand
c7.text: Your own logo, your own colours, your own address and a layout you decide. Manage your members at a glance, invite new ones by invitation — and new people discover you via the Discover page.

brand.title: Your brand.
brand.text: You decide your community's logo, colours and layout. Aera stays infrastructure in the background — no foreign platform feel.

home.finaleText: Start for free, set up spaces, invite members — monetise when you're ready. No credit card required.

settings.disconnectBlocked: Stripe could not be disconnected safely. End all subscriptions first and make sure the Connect account has no outstanding balance or other obligations.

domain.subHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only (3–63 characters). Your community will be reachable at this address. Leave empty for the default address (your handle).

mediaStudio.title: Image Studio
mediaStudio.subtitle: Create, edit and refine images with AI
mediaStudio.aiOff: AI is not configured (GEMINI_API_KEY missing). Only Resize is available.
mediaStudio.fromLibraryHint: Pick an image from your media library
mediaStudio.libraryEmpty: No images in your library yet.
mediaStudio.hint_remove-bg: One click: the subject is cut out onto a transparent background.
mediaStudio.hint_enhance: One click: sharper details, less noise, better exposure.
mediaStudio.promptCreatePlaceholder: e.g. Minimal poster of a coffee cup, warm morning light
mediaStudio.promptEditPlaceholder: e.g. Make the sky sunset orange, keep everything else
mediaStudio.emptyCreate: Describe your image below — or start from an existing one
mediaStudio.emptyPick: Add an image to work on
mediaStudio.emptyHint: Upload a file or pick one from your library
mediaStudio.historySaved: All results are saved to your media library automatically.
mediaStudio.errorLoad: The image could not be loaded.
mediaStudio.errorCredits: No credits left — top up in Credits & usage.
mediaStudio.errorNoImage: No image came back. Try rephrasing your request.
mediaStudio.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
